privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. The task downloads real image data from Unsplash URLs (photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 and photo-1501594907352-04cda38ebc29). The task involves using GIMP's paintbrush tool to add a visible brushstroke to a photograph. The verifier checks for: substantial change (≥1000 pixels modified), connected stroke regions, visible color contrast, and stroke-like shape characteristics. The agent has 90 seconds and 7 steps to complete the task with sparse rewards.
